Reproduced: SSE frozen half-open (relay pairs paused, no FIN/error event) at t+0; spec node added server-side at t+1s; board showed ZERO /api/board fetches and never rendered the new node for 75s (pushLive ref stayed true, 15s fallback poll stood down). Control hard-reload immediately showed it (150->151 nodes) — server was fresh, client froze.

Fixed: pushLive liveness detector deleted; 15s fallback poll always runs and rides ETag. Same half-open freeze scenario: quiet polls answered 304 (bodyless) at 15s cadence; after freezing the stream + adding a spec node server-side, the poll's 200 painted it in 9.1s (stream dead throughout, no reload). Status trace: 200,200,304,304,200.

Re-measured at e7468ead (data layer now on conditional loadBoard). Rail + graph tiles + HUD mounted; rail button -> session board (hash #/sessions/new, board lists live sessions), back -> #/graph with tiles; node tile click drills down (dashboard-ui visible); console errors: NONE.

Re-measured at e7468ead. Dead /api proxy (:8933 unbound): after apiFetch backoff the shell rendered the fail-loud panel ('backend unreachable — the board failed to load.' + retry), no eternal spinner. Relay to live backend brought up on :8933, retry click -> board loaded in ~1s.

Re-measured at e7468ead (post-commit HEAD). Self-heal: relay pairs frozen half-open (no FIN/error), spec node added server-side -> board painted it in 9.1s via the always-on poll, stream dead throughout. This run's quiet-window polls answered 200 legitimately (the board WAS changing each tick — this session's own measurement activity updates its record); the 304 half proven in-browser back-to-back: 200 + ETag then If-None-Match -> 304 with body length 0 through the same vite+relay chain (and at 15s cadence in the previous reading).
re-measure after tooltip-system change to styles.css/Dashboard.jsx: rail+HUD render, graph↔sessions switch works (hash #/sessions/new → #/graph), zero console errors

per-connection relay (5202→relay 8794→8791): after SSE established, froze all established pairs with no FIN (new conns still pass), then added a spec node server-side; rendered board showed the new tile 6.0s after the server board carried it (≤ one ~15s fallback-poll period), no reload; in-browser conditional refetch through the same chain answers 304/0 bytes on an unchanged board (app sends If-None-Match itself, data.js cache:no-store); the 200s seen while sessions were active were genuine ETag churn from live session activity; consoleErrors=0

B: half-open freeze → replacement stream +29.2s, DOM catch-up +15s (10s ping / 25s watchdog). A contrast in same transcript: old client NEVER replaced the stream in 100.9s, permanent poll-only mode
